about_deal_html:
Licensed Professionals Jjimjilbang Spa Amenities 4.5 Star

Pass to a Traditional Korean Jjimjilbang Spa

Are you ready to unwind and pamper yourself in the heart of NYC? Grab a general admission pass to this luxurious spot that rejuvenates your body and mind, leaving you refreshed. At The Spa Club, a team of professionals combines their experience with relaxing amenities to create your ultimate Korean-style jjimjilbang experience.

Why You'll Love It

✓

Healing Clay & Salt Rooms: Experience the Red Clay Room and traditional Jjimjilnbang, which use eco-friendly materials to radiate bio-infrared rays that purify the body, or visit the Himalayan Salt Room to help warm bones and support hormonal health.

✓

Advanced Sauna & Bathing: Boost cardiovascular health and immunity in the Dry Sauna, or retreat to the clothing-optional Bath Area (swimsuits permitted) for a thorough, rejuvenating rinse and soak.

✓

Full Recovery Access: Enjoy peaceful Recovery Rooms for quiet naps, steam saunas, and lounging areas designed for complete physical and mental restoration.

✓

Hassle-Free Amenities: Your pass includes complimentary spa loungewear, a personal locker, toiletries, towels, and Wi-Fi, ensuring you have everything needed for a seamless escape.

✓

All-Day Entry: With no appointment required for general admission, you can visit at your leisure any day (excluding federal holidays) to enjoy a full day of tranquility.

Plan Your Treatment

What's Included
+
  • General Spa Day Admission for One or Two: Valid any day excluding federal holidays. Features access to the Red Clay Room, Himalayan Salt Room, Dry Saunas, Steam Rooms, Bathhouses, and tranquil sleeping/lounging areas.
  • Convenience Package: Includes complimentary facial mask & spa loungewear, a personal locker for shoes and belongings, fresh towels, toiletries, and Wi-Fi access throughout the facility.
  • Optional Enhancements: Food, beverages, and specialty spa treatments are available for an additional fee.
Booking & House Rules
+

Before your appointment

  • Appointment is required only for treatments such as body massage, Korean body scrub, and Facials.
  • Please wait 24 hours after purchase before redeeming your voucher at The Spa Club.
  • The bath area is a clothing-optional space; you may bring a bathing suit if preferred. Proper swim attire is required if wearing a swimsuit.
  • Bring a valid government issued photo ID.
  • As a barefoot facility, sandals and flip flops are not allowed. Enjoy the experience of the heated floor
  • All guests must shower and rinse before and in between using the hot tub.
  • Children under the age of 10 are not permitted under any circumstance. Minors 17 and under must be accompanied by an adult at all times of the same gender to supervise them in the locker room.
  • To maintain hygiene, street clothes and underwear are not permitted. Wear the provided uniform for the coed area.

After your appointment

  • The Spa Club enforces a zero-tolerance policy towards sexual behavior. Any guest found engaging in such behavior will be immediately escorted off the premises without a refund and may be permanently banned from the spa.

How It Works

1. Grab the deal — purchase your spa day pass on Groupon.
2. No Booking Required — Just show up whenever you're ready.
3. Redeem — present your Groupon voucher upon arrival at the spa.
4. Enjoy — experience a rejuvenated you.

About the Practitioner

The SPA Club offers a premium Korean-inspired wellness experience with 15,000 sq. ft. of specialty baths, unique saunas, and relaxation lounges, combining tradition with modern technology for ultimate relaxation and rejuvenation.
